note: 41 spec-driven screens interpreted by crates/ui/ui-screens::SpecScreen. Custom screens (10 Phase-8 ones) live as their own structs in ui-screens. Total: 51 screens matching upstream FinceptTerminal v4.

specs.title: Markets — Indices
specs.summary: S&P 500, NASDAQ, Dow, world indices with change + range.

specs.title: Markets — Sectors
specs.summary: Sector rotation heatmap (tech, finance, energy, healthcare…).

specs.title: Markets — Heatmap
specs.summary: Colour-graded grid of constituents by % change.

specs.title: Markets — Breadth
specs.summary: Advance/decline, new highs/lows, %-above-MA50.

specs.title: News by Symbol
specs.summary: Filtered news stream for the selected watchlist symbol.

specs.title: News Sentiment
specs.summary: Adanos-style sentiment aggregator across retail + finance news.

specs.title: Portfolio Blotter
specs.summary: Trade blotter — every fill with P&L attribution.

specs.title: Portfolio Allocation
specs.summary: Holdings breakdown by sector / region / currency.

specs.title: Portfolio Performance
specs.summary: Equity curve, drawdown, benchmark overlay.

specs.title: Open Orders
specs.summary: Live order book across registered brokers.

specs.title: Fills
specs.summary: Execution log with VWAP vs mid slippage.

specs.title: Order Book
specs.summary: Top-of-book L1/L2 depth for selected symbol.

specs.title: Equity Screener
specs.summary: Filter universe by P/E, ROE, growth, moat.

specs.title: Valuation Model
specs.summary: DCF, peer multiples, persona-driven recommendation.

specs.title: Peer Analysis
specs.summary: Side-by-side comps across peer set.

specs.title: Insider Activity
specs.summary: SEC EDGAR insider transactions timeline.

specs.title: Crypto Exchanges
specs.summary: Spot + futures across Kraken, Binance, Coinbase.

specs.title: DeFi

specs.title: On-Chain
specs.summary: Large transfers, whale tracking, chain metrics.

specs.title: Economics Calendar
specs.summary: Upcoming macro releases with consensus + prior.

specs.title: Key Indicators
specs.summary: GDP, CPI, unemployment, PMI, yield curve snapshot.

specs.title: Forex — Majors
specs.summary: EUR/USD, GBP/USD, USD/JPY… with carry + volatility.

specs.title: Forex — Crosses
specs.summary: All cross-rates grid.

specs.title: Commodities

specs.title: Options Chain
specs.summary: Strikes × expiries grid with Greeks + IV.

specs.title: Strategy Builder
specs.summary: Multi-leg strategy P&L + payoff chart.

specs.title: Futures Curve
specs.summary: Term-structure plot per underlying.

specs.title: Yield Curve
specs.summary: Spot/forward/zero curves, US + major sovereigns.

specs.title: Credit Spreads
specs.summary: IG vs HY OAS, CDS basis, TED spread.

specs.title: Backtest Lab

specs.title: Node Editor

specs.title: Report Builder

specs.title: Report History
